message:
feat(extensions+scheduler): add HostcallReactorMesh for core-pinned shard dispatch and ReactorMesh for deterministic SPSC scheduling

extensions.rs: Adds HostcallReactorMesh — a core-pinned hostcall
dispatch mesh with configurable shard lanes. Each shard processes
hostcalls independently via bounded SPSC lanes, with FNV-1a hash-based
call_id routing for shard affinity. Includes HostcallReactorConfig,
HostcallReactorRequest/Completion types, and backpressure signaling.
Also refines PolicySnapshot::lookup to use map_or_else, merges duplicate
opcode-to-param mappings (SessionGetModel/EventsGetModel,
SessionGetThinkingLevel/EventsGetThinkingLevel), makes
CommonHostcallOpcode and HostcallPayloadArena::new public/const,
hoists use-imports to function top in hash methods, uses method reference
for token_eq_ascii_folded filter, and fixes snapshot test for global
deny precedence over per-extension allow.

scheduler.rs: Adds ReactorMesh — a deterministic multi-shard reactor
using bounded per-shard SPSC lanes with global sequence numbering.
Routing: hostcall completions hash-route by call_id for affinity,
events use round-robin. drain_global_order() emits envelopes in
ascending global sequence across shard heads for deterministic external
ordering. Includes ReactorMeshConfig, ReactorEnvelope,
ReactorBackpressure, ReactorMeshTelemetry, and SpscLane<T> generic
bounded queue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
